name_cn:
Top-tier replica Dior Bobby
Small ♥️ Pearl Grey
S8010 Small: 18*14*5cm
M8010 Medium:22*17*6
Latest shoulder bag in the series, a bag that looks thousands of times better in person than in pictures 🙋🏻‍♀️. Exquisite and stylish, made of high-quality calfskin 🐂, both premium and durable. Adjustable shoulder strap, very spacious, easily fits two phones, and most importantly, it goes perfectly with any outfit 😘
